properties.description: Unique identifier for users in the Cornerstone system.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should be unique within the context of user records
properties.business_description: A unique identifier assigned to each user for tracking their learning performance and activities within the CSOD platform.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate format to ensure it meets VARCHAR standards
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by userStatus, Filter by division, Filter by location

properties.description: Column representing the username of the user in the system.
properties.business_rules: Must be unique within the system, Can be null if the user has not set a username
properties.business_description: The username is used to identify users within the Cornerstone Learn platform and is essential for user authentication and tracking learning activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for duplicates in the userName column, Validate format to ensure it meets username criteria
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by userStatus, Filter by division

properties.description: The complete name of the user as recorded in the system.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should not contain special characters
properties.business_description: This column represents the full name of the user, which is essential for identifying individuals in reports and dashboards.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for leading or trailing spaces, Validate format to ensure it contains at least a first and last name
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by user status, Filter by division

properties.description: Column representing the email address of the user.
properties.business_rules: Must be a valid email format, Can be null if the user has not provided an email
properties.business_description: Email address used for communication and notifications related to learning activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate email format, Check for duplicates within the user base
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by user status, Filter by division

properties.description: Identifier for the manager of the user, represented as a string.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the user does not have a manager, Should reference a valid userId in the User_csod table if not null
properties.business_description: This column represents the unique identifier of the user's manager, which can be used to establish reporting relationships within the organization.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for valid userId references in the User_csod table, Ensure that if present, the managerId corresponds to an existing manager
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by managerId to analyze users under specific managers, Filter by userStatus to see active/inactive users under a manager

properties.description: The name of the manager associated with the user.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the user does not have a manager assigned, Should reflect the current manager's name
properties.business_description: This column represents the name of the user's manager, which is important for understanding reporting structures within the organization.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure the name is formatted correctly (e.g., no special characters), Check for consistency with the managerId column
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by division, Filter by user status

properties.description: The job title or role of the user within the organization.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the user does not have a defined position, Should accurately reflect the user's current job title
properties.business_description: This column represents the position held by the user, which is essential for understanding their role in the organization and for reporting on employee performance and compliance.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure that the position is a valid job title recognized by the organization, Check for consistency in naming conventions (e.g., avoid abbreviations)
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific positions to analyze performance metrics, Filter by division to see position distribution
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by position, GROUP BY position for performance analysis

properties.description: Column representing the division within the organization to which a user belongs.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should reflect the current division of the user
properties.business_description: This column indicates the specific division of the company that the user is associated with, which can be used to analyze user performance and compliance within different divisions.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure values are consistent with predefined divisions, Check for typos or incorrect entries
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific division, Filter by user status within division
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by division, GROUP BY division

properties.description: Column representing the geographical location of the user.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should accurately reflect the user's current location
properties.business_description: Indicates the physical or virtual location where the user is based, which can impact training and compliance activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against known location formats, Check for consistency with user profiles
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific locations, Filter by user status and location
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by location, GROUP BY location

properties.description: Indicates the current status of the user within the system.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Valid statuses include 'Active', 'Inactive', 'On Leave'
properties.business_description: This column represents whether a user is active, inactive, or on leave, which is crucial for understanding user engagement and compliance with learning activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure values are one of the predefined statuses, Check for null values where applicable
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by active users, Filter by inactive users
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by user status, PERCENTAGE of active vs inactive users

properties.description: The date when the user last logged into the system.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the user has never logged in, Should be in a valid date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
properties.business_description: This column represents the most recent date that a user accessed their account, which is crucial for tracking user engagement and compliance with learning activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure the date format is consistent, Check for null values where applicable
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific date ranges, Filter by user status to see active vs inactive users
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of users who logged in within a specific timeframe, MAX last login date to find the most recent activity

properties.description: The date when the user started their learning activities.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the user has not started any learning activities, Should be in a valid date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
properties.business_description: This column represents the start date of the user's learning journey within the Cornerstone system, which is crucial for tracking compliance and performance.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate date format, Check for future dates
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific start date, Filter by date range
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of users by start date, Average start date for compliance activities

properties.description: This table contains essential user information for employees within the Cornerstone Learning system, including identifiers, contact details, and organizational structure.
properties.business_purpose: The User_csod table serves as a foundational data source for generating insights into employee learning performance, enabling effective management and reporting within the organization.
properties.data_lineage: Data is sourced from the Cornerstone Learning platform and is populated through regular data extraction processes.
properties.data_retention: Data is retained for a period of 5 years to comply with organizational policies.
